name: Starter 1999

draft.notes: Pack has 2 basic lands, 1 rare, 3 uncommons, 9 commons (in that order). Four variations of each basic land in the set.

sourceNotes: Small set with fewer rares than a normal small set of the era. Printed in Belgium. 8 additional commons only appear in preconstructed products. No foils mentioned. 36 packs per box.
